claims.claim: The 48D codec expansion should not ghost or destabilize legacy-adjacent warmth and emotional/intentional dims 24-31.
claims.evidence_plan: Link legacy warmth mapping and contextual glimpse anchor tests.

claims.claim: Narrative arc dims 40-43 should capture evolving tone and inflection points rather than a static average.
claims.evidence_plan: Link four-point narrative arc, curvature, and dynamics tests.

claims.claim: Any future dynamic-arc gain or dimension expansion should remain default-off until replay/steward review because it would change live codec delivery.
claims.evidence_plan: Link default-off narrative arc readiness and live-gain boundary.
